raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX XXXX company charged my Amex Delta XXXX XXXX XXXX {$750.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. This amount did not match my reservation information so I called to inquire about it. I have a common first/last name and it turns out someone with the same first/last name had a reservation at the same location for similar days. XXXX incorrectly charged me for this. I can prove this because Amex requested information from XXXX on the request and XXXX provided the rental agreement for this other person. This person is from Georgia. I am from MN. I can prove with 100 % certainty the rental charge is fraudulent. I'm being charged for someone else. I have contacted XXXX repeatedly. The main customer support line has agreed this charge is incorrect and forwards it to their accounting department. No one ever responds. I have created a dispute with Amex and contacted them repeatedly. At first they sided with me but then reversed that when XXXX sent them the rental agreement for the other XXXX XXXX. It seems obvious no one actually looked to see it was for a different person with the same name. I have tried re-opening the dispute but no one is responding.
